reasoning: This workout directly addresses your limiter by focusing on lactate clearance and fatigue resistance. The 5-min to 20-min power drop highlights the need for improvement here. Connecting this training to the upcoming Alpine Loop, honing your ability to sustain higher power outputs on climbs will be invaluable.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform over-under intervals: 5 mins at 88% (209W), 2 mins at 108% (256W). Repeat for total of 4 sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
